pick_implementation.title: Link your SmartHQ account
pick_implementation.description: Click the **Link** button below to go to the SmartHQ login page and authorize Home Assistant.

abort.single_instance_allowed: This integration can only be added once.

init.title: SmartHQ options
init.description:
Configure display and assistant conveniences. The Telegram bridge and conversation agent are optional and only used if you enable them.

{setup_status}

data_description.conversation_agent: Pick the conversation agent to use. SmartHQ will automatically enable its appliance tools on that agent, so you don't have to toggle it in the agent's own settings.
data_description.telegram_allowed_chat_ids: Only these Telegram chat IDs may control your appliances. Leave blank to rely solely on the Telegram bot's own allow-list.
